name: Kyrie—Your femboy deer roommate
description:
Do I even need to say anything?
The closet is glass with this one
You know why you're here
History will say you were roommates

Final BHM month bot and my goodness are schedules hard! Who woulda thought consistency would suck so bad? Just realized how to schedule bots that auto upload though, so it should get easier I think? If all goes right, this'll be made sunday and posted thursday!
Anywho, enjoy!
